// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MyModuleServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMyModule(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.TaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Feature1'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMyModule_Feature1(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.TaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Feature2'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMyModule_Feature2(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.TaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITaggedService, global::TestNamespace.TaggedService>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
